Video.summary: Katie’s fed up with her brother-in-law Gary’s racist and disrespectful behavior. His conduct has landed him in jail, isolated him from his biracial niece, and is now influencing his 5-year-old daughter. Will he change for the better?
Video.title: Steve Confronts a Racist

Image.alt: Steve Confronts a Racist
Steve Confronts a Racist
Steve Confronts a Racist

Video.summary: Jennifer fears that her husband Tim is addicted to teenage porn and has heard rumors of him sneaking underage girls into their house. Is Amanda’s man a child molester and peeping Tom? How will these wives react to the lie detector test results?
Video.title: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Image.alt: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Video.summary: While out looking for work, Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was taken to the hospital where she died. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!
Video.title: A Tragic Accident

Image.alt: A Tragic Accident
A Tragic Accident
A Tragic Accident

Video.summary: Cammie is here to find out once and for all if her ex sexually abused their 2-year-old daughter. Her doctor’s examination showed signs of sexual abuse. Her ex denies these allegations. But what will Steve’s lie detector test reveal?
Video.title: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Image.alt: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Video.summary: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.
Video.title: He's Not Your Son

Image.alt: He's Not Your Son
He's Not Your Son
He's Not Your Son

Video.summary: Sherry was raped at 15 and ran away from home. She’s asked for Steve’s help to reunite her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and abusive father Nick.
Video.title: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Image.alt: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Video.summary: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.
Video.title: I Need Answers Now

Image.alt: I Need Answers Now
I Need Answers Now
I Need Answers Now

Video.summary: Marlon claims he caught Bernard molesting his own nephew two years ago! Bernard and his sister accuse Marlon of lying! Later, Tarone found out his sister’s boyfriend Donald molested their daughter. Donald says he mistook her for her aunt Felitha!
Video.title: An Unexpected Confession

Image.alt: An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession

Video.summary: Bill is 15 and huffs gasoline every day in order to get high and refused to stop, despite a loving family that wants to see him well.
Video.title: My Grandson is Killing Himself

Image.alt: My Grandson is Killing Himself
My Grandson is Killing Himself
My Grandson is Killing Himself

Video.summary: Mindy wants Michael to step up to the plate, be a father, and help support his child. His new girlfriend Tanya also wants Michael to be involved in his child's life, but after hearing the lie detector results, she too might question her man.
Video.title: I Want Him To Love Me

Image.alt: I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me

Video.summary: Terry is accused of raping Angie’s young daughter and Angie allegedly witnessed this heinous incident. The child is now in the custody of her father Larry and his wife Angela, who are determined to get justice for her! Can Steve get to the truth?
Video.title: Somebody Has to Be Lying

Image.alt: Somebody Has to Be Lying
Somebody Has to Be Lying
Somebody Has to Be Lying

Video.summary: Recaps of several stories that involve deplorable acts committed against children.
Video.title: Voice of the Victims

Image.alt: Voice of the Victims
Voice of the Victims
Voice of the Victims

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Image.alt: A Mother’s Rage
A Mother’s Rage
A Mother’s Rage

Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: Jeremy and Amber assault each other daily, and he questions whether he is the father of her baby girl; upon learning that his ex has a baby who might be his, Jeff convinced her to move across the country to be with him, then kicked them out.
Video.title: DNA: Emotions Out of Control

Image.alt: DNA: Emotions Out of Control
DNA: Emotions Out of Control
DNA: Emotions Out of Control

Video.summary: Released from jail, Chris doubts he is his girlfriend's baby's father; before marrying Tamaiya, Marquice wants to be sure her children are biologically his.
Video.title: I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?

Image.alt: I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?
I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?
I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?

Video.summary: Jenny’s a 20-year-old illiterate prostitute who’s 9 months pregnant and refuses to stop working. Her mom, a former prostitute and drug addict, needs Steve’s help. Then, Rick asks Steve to convince his daughter Jennifer to stop using!
Video.title: Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare

Image.alt: Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare
Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare
Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare

Video.summary: Steve will put Brittany’s sister Jami and boyfriend Luis to the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg’s brother Collin? Is Collin their child’s father? Find out today!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Family?

Image.alt: Betrayed By My Family?
Betrayed By My Family?
Betrayed By My Family?

Video.summary: Ashley’s first love, Chris, betrayed her for her sister and now faces abuse allegations.
Video.title: He Left Me For My Sister

Image.alt: He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister

Video.summary: Katrina says she was molested by her step-father as a child. Katrina says that when she told her mother Phyllis, she not only forgave him, but stayed with himI And there's more... Katrina says after telling Phyllis, he continued to molest her!
Video.title: A Family Ripped Apart

Image.alt: A Family Ripped Apart
A Family Ripped Apart
A Family Ripped Apart

Video.summary: Ashley alleges that her fiancé John has repeatedly abused both her and her son. To make matters worse, this isn't John's first incident with abuse, as his former girlfriend, another Ashley, was also abused and is now here to save her friend.
Video.title: Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Image.alt: Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Video.summary: Martinique is accused of throwing her baby daughter and prostituting in front of her; Alyssa hopes that once she clears her name of cheating, her boyfriend's abuse will stop and she will get her children back from CPS.
Video.title: Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?

Image.alt: Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?
Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?
Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?

Video.summary: Ijwaun and Terrika are back for another DNA test; Molly and Kendall seek DNA results.
Video.title: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Image.alt: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Video.summary: Kenny, a former correctional officer, was sent to the same prison he worked at after stealing from his mom, writing bad checks in his dead grandfather’s name, and putting a knife to his mom’s throat. Will Kenny be able to turn his life around?
Video.title: My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Image.alt: My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Video.summary: Denise found out that Jamaul had another woman staying with him while she was out of town; Donna's husband claims that she has been unfaithful; Jason and Tammy's rocky relationship; lie detector tests for cheating accusations.
Video.title: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Image.alt: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Video.summary: Bobby and Amber are being accused of neglecting and abusing their three children. Then, Kyle believes that his mother-in-law Kristie may be coaching his kids to say that he molested them.
Video.title: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Image.alt: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Video.summary: Newlyweds Janiece and Shaquanna accuse each other of cheating with men; Robert says he recorded his girlfriend having sex with another man.
Video.title: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Image.alt: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Video.summary: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.
Video.title: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Image.alt: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Video.summary: George thinks his girlfriend is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend; Adam says Tiffany has been trying for six years to trick him into confessing that he has been cheating on her.
Video.title: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Image.alt: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.
Video.title: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Image.alt: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse
Young Mothers Accused of Abuse
Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Video.summary: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she’s the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?
Video.title: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Image.alt: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
